chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.269 of 2021 Commissioner Inland Revenue Versus Dawn Convertec (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2261/21 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 2262/21 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA 2263/21 Dated: 16.12.2024 None present for the appellant. -.-.- Today is the third date of hearing when counsel for the appellant is not attending the matter. He was called absent on 04.12.2023 and 04.03.2024 followed by today’s date. No intimation either. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
